aws-athena:position-deletes:v2.notes: Supported via Athena engine v3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:position-deletes:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:equality-deletes:v2.notes: Supported via Athena engine v3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:equality-deletes:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:merge-on-read:v2.notes: Supports merge-on-read for both position and equality deletes with S3 Tables

aws-athena:merge-on-read:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:copy-on-write:v2.notes: Copy-on-write is the default write mode; MERGE/DELETE use merge-on-read regardless of table properties
caveats: MERGE and DELETE always use merge-on-read

aws-athena:copy-on-write:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:schema-evolution:v2.notes: Add, drop, and rename columns supported with S3 Tables

aws-athena:schema-evolution:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:type-promotion:v2.notes: Type promotion supported with S3 Tables

aws-athena:type-promotion:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:column-default-values:v2.notes: Column default values are a V3 feature

aws-athena:column-default-values:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:table-creation:v2.notes: CREATE TABLE supported with S3 Tables via Athena

aws-athena:table-creation:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:hidden-partitioning:v2.notes: Supports identity, bucket, truncate, year, month, day, hour transforms with S3 Tables

aws-athena:hidden-partitioning:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:partition-evolution:v2.notes: Partition evolution supported with S3 Tables

aws-athena:partition-evolution:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:multi-arg-transforms:v2.notes: Multi-argument transforms are a V3 feature

aws-athena:multi-arg-transforms:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:time-travel:v2.notes: Query by snapshot ID or timestamp with S3 Tables

aws-athena:time-travel:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:table-maintenance:v2.notes: S3 Tables provides automatic compaction; manual OPTIMIZE and VACUUM also supported via Athena

aws-athena:table-maintenance:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:branching-tagging:v2.notes: Athena can read tags via $ref metadata table but cannot create or manage branches/tags on S3 Tables

aws-athena:branching-tagging:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:read-support:v2.notes: Full read support via Athena engine v3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:read-support:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:write-insert:v2.notes: INSERT INTO and CTAS supported with S3 Tables

aws-athena:write-insert:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:write-merge-update-delete:v2.notes: MERGE, UPDATE, DELETE supported via Athena engine v3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:write-merge-update-delete:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:catalog-integration:v2.notes: Integrated with S3 Tables catalog (AWS-managed REST-based catalog)

aws-athena:catalog-integration:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:statistics:v2.notes: Column statistics supported with S3 Tables

aws-athena:statistics:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:bloom-filters:v2.notes: Bloom filter support with S3 Tables not explicitly documented

aws-athena:bloom-filters:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:hive-metastore:v2.notes: S3 Tables uses its own catalog; Hive Metastore not supported

aws-athena:hive-metastore:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:aws-glue-catalog:v2.notes: S3 Tables uses its own built-in catalog, not AWS Glue

aws-athena:aws-glue-catalog:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:rest-catalog:v2.notes: S3 Tables exposes a REST-compatible catalog API

aws-athena:rest-catalog:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:nessie:v2.notes: S3 Tables does not support Nessie catalog

aws-athena:nessie:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:polaris:v2.notes: S3 Tables does not support Polaris catalog

aws-athena:polaris:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:unity-catalog:v2.notes: S3 Tables does not support Unity Catalog

aws-athena:unity-catalog:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:hadoop-catalog:v2.notes: S3 Tables does not support Hadoop catalog

aws-athena:hadoop-catalog:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:jdbc-catalog:v2.notes: S3 Tables does not support JDBC catalog

aws-athena:jdbc-catalog:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:variant-type:v2.notes: Variant type is a V3 feature

aws-athena:variant-type:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:shredded-variant:v2.notes: Shredded variant is a V3 feature

aws-athena:shredded-variant:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:geometry-type:v2.notes: Geometry type is a V3 feature

aws-athena:geometry-type:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:nanosecond-timestamps:v2.notes: Nanosecond timestamps are a V3 feature

aws-athena:nanosecond-timestamps:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:lineage:v2.notes: Lineage tracking is a V3 feature

aws-athena:lineage:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 with S3 Tables

aws-athena:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v2.notes: Athena can access Snowflake Horizon Catalog via AWS Glue Catalog Federation, enabling read-only access to Snowflake-managed Iceberg V2 tables. Write operations are not supported — this is an Athena engine limitation, not a Horizon Catalog or Glue Catalog Federation limitation.
caveats: Read-only — write operations to external catalogs not supported by Athena
Requires AWS Glue Catalog Federation configuration

aws-athena:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3 tables. This is an Athena engine limitation, not a Glue Catalog Federation or Horizon Catalog limitation. Athena supports Horizon Catalog for reads on V2 tables via Glue Catalog Federation.

aws-athena:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

aws-athena:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: Athena does not support Iceberg V3, so V3 deletion vectors are unavailable.
